title: Timeline Legend shows "No Value"
excerpt: Hi, a Dashboard that I created is showing data from 3 connected boards, but in the color legend on the bottom of a timeline widget the last one just shows “No Value”, where the first two boards are showing with their boa…

posts.author: makeandcreate (Leo B)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, a Dashboard that I created is showing data from 3 connected boards, but in the color legend on the bottom of a timeline widget the last one just shows “No Value”, where the first two boards are showing with their board title.
My question basically is, does monday-legend__field-name get it’s data from the board title? And if so, why doesn’t it display the value of the third board title?
Many thanks in advance.
Leo

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Leonard,

I’ve tested this on my end and haven’t run into the same issue… just to check, are any of the columns you’re including in the widget mirrored columns?

That said, would you be happy to share some screenshots or a screen-recording of the widget settings for me to cross-check? You can use the free, online tool loom.com to record If you’d prefer, you’re more than welcome to share these visuals in a private message

posts.author: makeandcreate (Leo B)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, thanks for looking into it.
I attached a screenshot of the dashboard. We are not using any mirrored columns in any of the boards.
The board that shows No Value used to be a private board that got changed to a public one. So following this idea, I unconnected this board and connected it again. So I guess the Timeline Widget is only checking if the Board Title can be fetched when connecting it, but this is never being tried again? Would be good to send an update from changing the board type to possible connected dashboards, that the title can now be read.
Best,
Leonard

monday.com1653×1002 95 KB
